sb_prompt: WHAT IS BEING DONE IN YOUR COMMUNITY OR AREA ABOUT RECYCLING WASTE MATERIALS?  DO YOU THINK MORE SHOULD BE DONE?  DO YOU HAVE ANY IDEAS ON HOW TO ENCOURAGE MORE RECYCLING OR ON WHAT OTHER MATERIALS SHOULD BE INCLUDED?
raw_output:
Participants: ParticiaBt (female), JohnDoe (male)
Purpose: To discuss community recycling efforts and suggest ways to improve them
Opening move: Particiabt asks if there are any plans for increasing recyling in their area

Particiabrt: Hi, I was wondering if you know what kind of recycing programs your local government has planned in our community?
JohnDoe: Yeah, we do have some sort of program here but I think they could be doing more. What do you think?
Pariticibtr: Well, yes, I believe that as well. Do you happen to know which materials are accepted in the recycle bin?
Johndoe: It varies depending on where you live but generally speaking, paper products, plastic bottles and cans are the main items collected. But honestly, most people don’t seem to care much or they just don’tknow how important it is to separate these things properly.
Particulartr: That’s true, unfortunately. Have you heard of any initiatives or campaigns aimed at educating peopleon proper waste disposal methods?
